name: Virulent Vessels: The Legend of Gobbledygunk
short_description: Virulent Vessels is a turn-based strategy game where you fight against waves of enemies in a chess-like battle royale, each of them aiming to leave Land of the Dead! Each foe has a tricky pattern for you to learn over the course of two campaigns, and an Endless mode. Reclaim your second chance!
detailed_description:
And when she drank the last of the poison vial, all she could think was...
GOBBLEDYGUNK!
...also known as The God of Second Chances.

After committing suicide, our protagonist, Duo, finds that she misses the Land of the Living and wishes to return— A sentiment held by most residents of the Land of the Dead. Gobbledygunk seizes this opportunity to satisfy his twisted desires and pit all the residents of the Land of the Dead against each other in a fight to the death!

Upon death, you may choose to participate in this battle to gain entry back to the Land of the Living—with a wish granted to you by Gobbledygunk himself! The catch is, that every participant in his sick game is morphed into a form that reflects their deepest regrets from their old life. But what was meant to be a curse turned out to be a blessing for Duo, as she gained the ability to possess powerful Vessels and gain an advantage in the competition!

Now with the resources to claim her Second Chance, Duo climbs Fort Gobbledy hoping to finish what she started back in the Land of the Living...

This Game Features...
...3 PLAYABLE VESSELS with UNIQUE ABILITIES!



...VARIOUS FOES with TRICKY PATTERNS!



...CHALLENGING CAMPAIGN and ENDLESS MODES!



...a CAPTIVATING STORY for the ages!



...SECRETS and CUSTOMIZATION options!



...3 JAMMING SOUNDTRACKS?!




Reclaim your Second Chance in... VIRULENT VESSELS: THE LEGEND OF GOBBLEDYGUNK!
